purpose: MUSTER M-A2 chat-parity gate pack for the exact row Phi-3-mini-4k-instruct-Q8_0.gguf (sha256 0ac8ee48aeebf7d1b354691fd1e29e91c32ad88bbad10ad45ac880dcd4372a47), to be driven by scripts/chat-parity-phi3.mjs at greedy 1/5/50 on the optimized CPU lane.
